title: CF_DocCentralV3_SendReminders — Response Schema
description: This flow has no response output. It is a scheduled background flow. Results are written to AuditLog only. This document describes what is logged.
noOutputNote: Scheduled flows do not return data to a caller. There is no Respond action. Canvas App cannot receive a response from this flow.

started.message: concat('Pokretanje slanja podsetnika za datum ', varTodayDate)

noReminders.message: concat('Nema podsetnika za slanje za datum ', varTodayDate)

perRecipientEmailFailed.message: concat('Slanje podsetnika ID <id> nije uspelo za primaoca: <email>.')

isSentUpdateFailed.message: concat('Označavanje podsetnika ID <id> kao poslat nije uspelo. Podsetnik može biti ponovo poslat.')

overallSuccess.message: concat('Slanje podsetnika završeno. Poslato: N, Neuspešno: 0.')

overallPartialFailure.message: concat('Slanje podsetnika završeno. Poslato: N, Neuspešno: M.')

monitoringNote: Flow success/failure is visible in Power Automate run history. AuditLog provides business-level visibility of what was sent. Admins should monitor AuditLog Warning entries for missed reminders or IsSent update failures.
